config.seed_text: The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text:
A set from which to build an ark inspired some genius; but with no real connection between poets and art or social interaction — there seemed little we could do about them unless they came out as literary garbage like me? (One might wonder why I am more interested than anyone else if one does not look at all people who did write fiction for money.) It seems almost impossible now that you can use this LITERATURE field theory without making yourself ill so much better able bodied …

…so maybe what happens when those writers don't die off quickly enough then suddenly go into serious writing fields ... well how exactly will their literature survive

You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions. A set from which to build an ark inspired some genius; but with no real connection between poets and art or social interaction — there seemed little we could do about them unless they came out as literary garbage like me? (One might wonder why I am more interested than anyone else if one does not look at all people who did write fiction for money.) It seems almost impossible now that you can use this LITERATURE field theory without making yourself ill so much better able bodied …

…so maybe what happens when those writers don't die off quickly enough then suddenly go into serious writing fields ... well how exactly will their literature survive
